remarks: Endorsement Schedule: (1) CG 21 39 10 93 — Contractual Liability Limitation; (2) CG 20 37 04 13 — Additional Insured - Owners, Lessees or Contractors - Completed Operations; (3) WC 00 01 00 — Workers Compensation and Employers Liability Insurance Policy; (4) CP 12 18 06 07 — Loss Payable Provisions; (5) IM 99 01 09 09 — Inland Marine Equipment Floater; (6) IL 00 17 11 98 — Common Policy Conditions. Waiver of Subrogation applies in favor of the certificate holder as required by written contract.
